title: Mini Golf
description: Mini Golf in Minecraft. Full 18 hole course!
body:
Mini Golf Mod brings a full 18-hole mini golf course right into your Minecraft world! Grab your putter, pick your ball
   color, and challenge your friends to see who can conquer the course with the fewest strokes.

  How It Works

  When you join, you're automatically equipped with a Golf Putter, Golf Ball, and Scorecard. The course builds itself at
   spawn — just walk up to Hole 1 and start playing!

  Controls

  - Right-click with Golf Ball — Drop your ball at the tee area
  - Right-click and hold with Golf Putter — Charge your swing (the power bar cycles back and forth for precision timing
  — release at the perfect moment!)
  - Release right-click — Swing! The ball launches in the direction you're facing
  - Right-click with Scorecard — View your full round scores with color-coded results

  The Course

  Play through 18 uniquely themed holes that span multiple levels of terrain:

  - Upper Level — Garden Party, Backyard Park, Mushroom Forest, Canyon Mesa, Tropical Lagoon, Hedge Garden
  - Descend into the depths through the Dungeon's stone staircase
  - Underground Level — Explore the Castle courtyard, dodge lava around the massive Volcano, and raid the Pirate Cove
  - Portal back to the surface through Candy Land's magic portal onto a raised platform
  - Back on top — Navigate the Graveyard, slide across the Frozen Tundra's ice physics, and brave The Nether
  - Dive underwater through Ocean Depths' coral-lined descent
  - Deep Below — Find peace in the Cherry Blossom zen garden and mine your way through the Mineshaft
  - Grand Finale — Rainbow Road's portal launches you back to the surface for the trophy hole!

  Each hole features hand-crafted decorations, themed obstacles, and unique challenges. Bounce off bumper walls, aim
  through portal shortcuts, navigate S-curves, and putt across slippery ice. The ball physics feel satisfying — watch
  your ball roll along checkered greens, ricochet off wooden bumpers, and drop into the cup with a cheerful sound.

  Features

  - 18 themed holes with varied shapes, sizes, and par values (Par 28 total for the front 9, Par 28 for the back 9)
  - Multi-level terrain — the course goes up and down across three elevation levels with ramps, stairs, and portals
  - 5 portal holes — teleport your ball through walls, across lagoons, and up to raised platforms
  - Ice physics on the Frozen Tundra hole
  - Cycling power bar — times your swing for precision control
  - HUD overlay — live score bar, power meter, and rotating minimap showing the current hole layout
  - Multiplayer ready — each player gets a unique ball color (8 colors). Race your friends through the course!
  - Hole-in-one celebration — confetti particles and firework sounds
  - Fireworks display when you finish all 18 holes
  - Auto-equip — golf items given on join, course builds automatically
  - Single course enforcement — placing a new course removes the old one

  Grab some friends, drop your balls at the tee, and see who takes home the lowest score. Happy putting!
